endpoints.name: POST /v1/verificationTokens:generate
endpoints.description: Generates a token for the provided location data as a vetted [partner](https://support.google.com/business/answer/7674102). Throws PERMISSION_DENIED if the caller is not a vetted partner account. Throws FAILED_PRECONDITION if the caller's VettedStatus is INVALID.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{location}:fetchVerificationOptions
endpoints.description: Reports all eligible verification options for a location in a specific language.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}/VoiceOfMerchantState
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:complete
endpoints.description: Completes a `PENDING` verification. It is only necessary for non `AUTO` verification methods. `AUTO` verification request is instantly `VERIFIED` upon creation.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:verify
endpoints.description: Starts the verification process for a location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/verifications
endpoints.description: List verifications of a location, ordered by create time.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
